item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 160430Z AUTO VRB01KT CAVOK 18/17 Q1017 TEMPO 4000 BR
🟡 TAF LFOT 152300Z 1600/1624 03007KT CAVOK PROB30 1602/1606 4000 BR TEMPO 1612/1619 VRB12G25KT 4000 SHRA FEW080CB PROB40 TEMPO 1614/1618 VRB15G30KT 2500 -TSRA SCT080CB PROB30 TEMPO 1614/1618 VRB20G45KT TSRAGR BKN070CB
